{"activeBranchId":0,"chainList":[{"description":"尤诺处于"月相流转"状态时，攻击提升40%。

尤诺处于满月领域中时，自身每秒额外回复1点共鸣能量。

共鸣技能·越限的弦引和重击·至臻的完满免疫打断。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1758004775792.png","name":"圆与缺，皆替金枝镀色","order":1,"unlocked":true},{"description":"队伍中的角色的"苍白死光的祝颂"叠加至10层时，其额外获得40%全伤害加深。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1758004810208.png","name":"昼或夜，且以它为永恒","order":2,"unlocked":true},{"description":"尤诺处于"月相流转"状态时，月弓·普攻、共鸣技能·越限的弦引、月弓·闪避反击造成的伤害加深65%。

施放月弓·普攻或月弓·闪避反击后一定时间内，施放共鸣技能·越限的弦引将不会重置月弓·普攻的连段。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1758005154554.png","name":"我痛饮他者的遗忘","order":3,"unlocked":true},{"description":"施放重击·至臻的完满时，队伍中的角色获得一个基于尤诺攻击160%的护盾，持续时间30秒，切换至其他角色不会继承该护盾。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1758004938955.png","name":"任雨季栖息于眼眸","order":4,"unlocked":true},{"description":"共鸣解放伤害加成提升20%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1758004576015.png","name":"万千次虚掷的注视","order":5,"unlocked":true},{"description":"重击·至臻的完满伤害倍率增加1600%。

尤诺施放重击·至臻的完满时，会再次进入"月相流转"·新月状态，获得100点【"灵性"】并重置共鸣技能·越限的弦引的全部冷却。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1758004788465.png","name":"我所在，即为不变的独一","order":6,"unlocked":true}],"equipPhantomAddPropList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png"},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"1265","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"44.1%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"140.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"28.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"46.1%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625855579.png"},{"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"70.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625723554.png"}],"equipPhantomAttributeList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625411169.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"450","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625640635.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"85.9%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625513563.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"44.1%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625349422.png","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"140.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766626216694.png","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"28.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625583038.png","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"46.1%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625555676.png","key":"19-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"60.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766626206569.png","key":"25-1","valid":true}],"level":90,"phantomData":{"cost":12,"equipPhantomList":[{"cost":4,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"","groupId":20,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1755850911266.png","name":"荣斗铸锋之冠","num":3,"secondDescription":"","tripleDescription":"角色获得护盾时，自身攻击提升6%，暴击伤害提升4%，该效果可叠加5层，持续4秒，每0.5秒可触发一次。","type":1},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"44.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626001915.png","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"150","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626168865.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":4,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1755850845365.png","name":"海之女","phantomId":6000160,"phantomPropId":60001605,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤【潮涌之漩】，对敌人造成至多十段13.68%的气动伤害和一段164.16%的气动伤害。

在首位装配该声骸技能时，自身气动伤害加成提升12.00%，共鸣解放伤害加成提升12.00%。

技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"19-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21.0%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"气动伤害提升10%","groupId":17,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1749626319815.png","name":"愿戴荣光之旅","num":2,"secondDescription":"攻击命中存在【风蚀效应】的敌人时，自身暴击提升10%，气动伤害提升30%，持续10秒。","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"18.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625555859.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1749626061986.png","name":"小翼龙·热熔","phantomId":6000107,"phantomPropId":60001075,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤小翼龙·热熔，造成五次每次25.92%的热熔伤害。

技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"19-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":3,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"气动伤害提升10%","groupId":17,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1749626319815.png","name":"愿戴荣光之旅","num":2,"secondDescription":"攻击命中存在【风蚀效应】的敌人时，自身暴击提升10%，气动伤害提升30%，持续10秒。","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"30.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625876982.png","key":"25-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"100","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626168865.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":3,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1749626334164.png","name":"传道者的遗形","phantomId":6000111,"phantomPropId":60001115,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，幻形为传道者的遗形，对周围敌人造成268.20%的气动伤害。

技能冷却：15秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"19-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true}]}]},"role":{"acronym":"yn","attributeId":4,"attributeName":"气动","breach":6,"chainUnlockNum":6,"isMainRole":false,"level":90,"roleIconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_icon/1758005198832.png","roleId":1410,"roleName":"尤诺","rolePicUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_pic/1766623325360.png","starLevel":5,"weaponTypeId":4,"weaponTypeName":"臂铠"},"roleAttributeList":[{"attributeId":2,"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"15085","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png","sort":1000},{"attributeId":7,"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"2835","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png","sort":2000},{"attributeId":10,"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"1124","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png","sort":3000},{"attributeId":8,"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"101.5%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png","sort":5000},{"attributeId":9,"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"299%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png","sort":6000},{"attributeId":11,"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"100%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png","sort":7000},{"attributeId":141,"attributeName":"偏谐值累积效率","attributeValue":"100.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625821120.png","sort":7500},{"attributeId":19,"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"70%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625855579.png","sort":11000},{"attributeId":25,"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"70.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625723554.png","sort":16000}],"roleSkin":{"isAddition":false,"picUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_pic/1766623201674.png","priority":1,"quality":3,"qualityName":"初始服饰","roleId":1410,"skinIcon":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_icon/1758005198111.png","skinId":81001410,"skinName":"空度量"},"skillList":[{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"月环·普攻

使用月环进行最多3段的连续攻击，造成气动伤害。



空中攻击

消耗耐力进行空中下落攻击，造成气动伤害。



月环·闪避反击

成功闪避后一定时间内短按普攻，将会使用月环攻击目标，造成气动伤害。施放该技能后一定时间内短按普攻，将会施放月环·普攻第三段。



月弓·普攻

尤诺可施放重击·流变·月环，进入"月相流转"·新月状态，在此状态下尤诺将使用月弓进行攻击。

使用月弓进行最多3段的连续攻击，造成气动伤害，此次伤害为共鸣解放伤害。

可在空中施放。



月弓·闪避反击

月相流转·新月状态下，成功闪避后一定时间内短按普攻，将会使用月弓攻击目标，造成气动伤害，此次伤害为共鸣解放伤害。

月相流转·新月状态下，施放该技能后一定时间内短按普攻，将会施放月弓·普攻第三段。

可在空中施放。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1757909582385.png","id":593,"name":"祭者独步","skillBranches":[],"type":"常态攻击"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"原初的律动

尤诺向前突进，造成气动伤害。



告终的喧响

尤诺不处于"月相流转"状态时，施放月环·普攻第3段、变奏技能或原初的律动时，共鸣技能替换为告终的喧响，持续5秒。

施放告终的喧响时，造成多段气动伤害，并进入月相流转状态。 



未终的喧响

尤诺处于月相流转·弦月状态时，共鸣技能替换为未终的喧响。

施放未终的喧响时，造成多段气动伤害。

告终的喧响与未终的喧响共用同一个冷却时间。



越限的弦引

尤诺处于月相流转·新月状态时，共鸣技能替换为越限的弦引，初始拥有2次可施放次数。

施放越限的弦引时，尤诺进行一次位移，并造成气动伤害，此次伤害为共鸣解放伤害。

-技能位移期间可通过移动输入延长位移距离。当尤诺处于受击或被击飞状态中，施放越限的弦引将脱离受击状态或被击飞状态。

可在空中施放。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1757910225360.png","id":594,"name":"先觉赋格","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"造成气动伤害，并进入"月相流转"状态。

可在空中施放。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1757909823276.png","id":595,"name":"溺失月海","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣解放"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"造成气动伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1757909839222.png","id":598,"name":"照我以显","skillBranches":[],"type":"变奏技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"月相流转

尤诺可以通过施放共鸣技能·告终的喧响或共鸣解放进入月相流转状态。

月相流转分为弦月和新月两种状态，初始默认进入弦月状态，尤诺可以通过施放重击·流变进行两种状态间的切换。

处于月相流转状态下：尤诺的跳跃替换为重击·流变；尤诺在空中时无法进行耐力回复；

移动时，尤诺会进入漫溯巡游状态，以特殊表现进行移动，在空中时会持续消耗耐力。

当触发特定场景交互、探索工具或长按跳跃键时，将退出月相流转状态。



月相流转·弦月

尤诺使用月环攻击，命中目标时可恢复【"灵性"】。

尤诺可施放重击·流变·月弓，造成气动伤害，此次伤害为共鸣解放伤害，进入月相流转·新月状态。

重击·流变·月弓可在空中施放。



月相流转·新月

尤诺使用月弓攻击，施放月弓·普攻、共鸣技能·越限的弦引、月弓·闪避反击时可消耗【灵性】，提升该次技能的伤害倍率，回复额外的协奏能量，并为附近队伍中的角色回复生命值。

尤诺可施放重击·流变·月环，造成气动伤害，此次伤害为共鸣解放伤害，进入月相流转·弦月状态。

重击·流变·月环可在空中施放。



重击·至臻的完满

尤诺协奏能量充满时，重击替换为至臻的完满。

施放至臻的完满时，尤诺结束自身的月相流转状态，为附近队伍中的角色回复生命值；

对周围目标造成气动伤害，此次伤害为共鸣解放伤害；

以自身为中心展开满月领域，该效果25秒最多可触发一次。

可在空中施放。



满月领域

处于领域中的角色，周期性获得治疗和耐力回复。

处于领域中的登场角色获得护盾时，可获得一层苍白死光的祝颂，该效果每0.5秒可触发一次。



苍白死光的祝颂

角色全伤害加深4%，持续10秒，可叠加10层，重复添加时刷新持续时间。若切换至其他角色则该效果提前结束。



灵性

灵性上限100点。

尤诺施放变奏技能时，可获得40点【灵性】。

尤诺施放共鸣解放时，可获得60点【灵性】。

尤诺施放告终的喧响或未终的喧响时，可获得25点【灵性】。

尤诺处于月相流转状态时，月环·普攻、月环·闪避反击、空中攻击命中目标时，可获得【灵性】。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1757909681875.png","id":599,"name":"于盈亏间涨落","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣回路"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":1,"skill":{"description":"攻击目标造成100%的气动伤害，下一个登场角色重击伤害加深50%，持续14秒，若切换至其他角色则该效果提前结束。
